pages.title: Void Into Gold
pages.tagline: Turn darkness to light with this sultry summer groove.

pages.body: Close your eyes and step out of the noise. 'Void Into Gold' is a smooth Afro R&B journey where warm live strings meet hypnotic reggae basslines, creating a sanctuary for healing. As female vocals drift over glitch-hop textures, you release societal pressure and internal alarms to embrace self-love under a summer night sky. This track blends Sade-like elegance with electronic flourishes to guide you from cold walls into radiant light. It is an invitation to close the laptop on your burdens and let the bass roll low until only peace remains.
pages.styleSentence: A smooth Afro R&B summer groove driven by a hypnotic reggae-style bassline and warm live strings, featuring female sulty alto vocals over glitch-hop textures, cinematic violins, and relaxed danceable rhythms that blend Sade-like elegance with BT-inspired electronic flourishes.

pages.text:
[Intro - Spoken Female]
Mm
This summer feel different
No rush
No weight
No noise in my head tonight

[Intro Chant]
Ah ya ya
We outside now
Ah ya ya
Sun going down
Ah ya ya
Let the bass roll low
Let the mind let go

[Verse 1]
I had too much living on my shoulders
Too many tabs open in my mind
Same old walls getting colder
Same old clock stealing time

Then the strings came in like sunlight
Bassline moving through the smoke
One deep breath and I felt life
Pull me back before I broke

Now the beach got bottles glowing
Little fire by the shore
Laptop closed but the soul still loading
I don’t need to chase no more

[Pre-Chorus]
Pour a little something sweet
Roll a little peace if you need
Eat the fruit, taste the heat
Find your balance in the feast

No shame in a joyful body
No fear in a healing night
If the world gets loud around me
I’ma dance until it’s light

[Chorus]
Empty your mind
Fill up your heart
Move with the night
Let the good life start

Love who you love
Hold who you hold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Oh-oh, let it go
Oh-oh, nice and slow
Oh-oh, feel your soul
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

[Post-Chorus - Vocal Chops]
Wine slow
Bass low
Eyes closed
Let go

New me
Still loading
Heart clean
Still glowing

[Verse 2]
Cocktails and code on the table
Dreams in the blue screen light
I was building when I was able
Now I’m living what I typed

No more waiting on permission
No more saving joy for later
Every heartbeat is a rhythm
Every breath a little savior

She got flowers in her hair now
He got smoke up in the air
Everybody got a story
Everybody needs repair

But tonight we keep it tender
No judgment in the room
Just the ocean, drums, and violins
Cutting silver through the moon

[Pre-Chorus 2]
Have a drink but keep your spirit
Take a puff but keep your name
Taste the world but don’t disappear in it
Pleasure don’t have to become pain

Pass the plate and pass forgiveness
Raise your glass and bless the air
We are only here a minute
So be kind while we are here

[Chorus]
Empty your mind
Fill up your heart
Move with the night
Let the good life start

Love who you love
Hold who you hold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

Oh-oh, let it go
Oh-oh, nice and slow
Oh-oh, feel your soul
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

[Bridge - Spoken Over Snare, Bass Wobble, Strings]
Listen
You don’t have to answer every alarm
You don’t have to carry every ghost
Some nights are made for healing
Some nights are made for hands in the air
Some nights you just thank the sky
That your heart still knows how to beat

[Breakdown - Sung / Chopped]
Mind go quiet
Heart go wide
Bassline rolling
Ocean tide

Mind go quiet
Heart go wide
This summer different
We still alive

[Final Chorus]
Empty your mind
Fill up your heart
Move with the night
Let the good life start

Love who you love
Hold who you hold
We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

[Outro]
Ah ya ya
We outside now
Ah ya ya
Sun going down

Wine slow
Bass low
Eyes closed
Let go

We came from the void
Now we turn it into gold

pages.caption: A sultry summer night where warm strings, glowing beach bottles, and a rolling bassline transform mental voids into golden healing moments u

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Drifts like smoke over the groove with smoky elegance.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Weaves harmony layers that lift the soul higher and deeper.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without ever rushing the beat too fast.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle textures to keep relaxation interesting at every turn.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Rolls low through the smoke with a hypnotic reggae-style hum.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints cinematic violins that bridge electronic and organic sounds perfectly.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Glitches gently around edges like digital fireflies in summer night air.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plucks warm notes to replace cold walls with sunlight instantly.

levels.name: SUNSET SOFT START
levels.emotion: Anticipation and relaxation as the sun sets, inviting a slow bassline to roll up.

levels.name: COLD WALL RELIEF
levels.emotion: Reflective weariness turning into relief as warmth replaces cold walls.

levels.name: BALANCE FEAST RISE
levels.emotion: Awakening joy, finding balance, and preparing for an emotional release.

levels.name: VOID TO GOLD SHINE
levels.emotion: Triumphant transformation and shining brightly after the journey.

levels.name: WINE SLOW BASS LOW
levels.emotion: Tender forgiveness and mindful appreciation of fleeting moments.

levels.name: QUIET GRACE ACCEPTANCE
levels.emotion: Quiet gratitude and acceptance after letting go of internal alarms.

levels.name: MOMENTUM LOVE LIGHTS
levels.emotion: Building momentum towards transformation with love and light.
